name: Mustard, Sweet and Spicy German-Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mustard seed and dry mustard with cold water. Allow to sit overnight in the refrigerator.
2. In a separate bowl, combine all remaining ingredients except honey.
3. Simmer uncovered for 10-15 minutes or until the liquid is reduced by half. For a hotter mustard, reduce the liquid by more than half.
4. Pour the mixture through a strainer into the mustard and seed mixture.
5. Blend thoroughly. Cook in a double boiler until the consistency of gravy.
6. Add the honey. The mustard will keep refrigerated for several years. Many different flavors can be made by modifying this basic recipe. Substitute wine for the cold water, etc., and add other spices as desired.
